privacy.s: Wikipedia "Data breach" section: On December 20, 2019, Wawa's CEO Chris Gheysens announced that the company had found malicious software on its payment processing servers that affected every location across the country, according…

wiki.controversies:
==Controversies==
Wawa's expansion efforts have sometimes met with controversy from local communities. In Coral Gables, Florida, land which was planned to be used for affordable housing was instead approved as a new site for a Wawa gas station.
wiki.extract: Wawa Inc. is an American chain of convenience stores and gas stations originating in the Philadelphia metropolitan area and located along the East Coast of the United States, operating in Pennsylvania, New Jersey, Delaware, Maryland, Virginia, Washington, D.C., West Virginia, Florida, Alabama, North Carolina, Ohio, Georgia, Kentucky, and Indiana. Wawa is based in and primarily associated with the Philadelphia metropolitan area, though it gradually expanded its store locations, over many decades, far beyond the Philadelphia area. The company's headquarters is located in the Wawa area of Chester

topHazards.label: The metal straw inside the tumbler can cut your mouth and/or fingers, posing a laceration hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: HALO Recalls Tumblers with Metal Straws Due to Laceration Hazard; Sold Exclusively at Wawa Stores
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves a reusable tumbler with a metal straw. The plastic tumblers come in four styles: "The Mermaid", which is pink/green, "Island Surf", which is blue/yellow, "Sailor Breeze", which is tan/orange, and "The Galaxy", which is blue/pink. The tumblers come with a tan lid. The tumbler comes in 24-ounce size…
hazards: The metal straw inside the tumbler can cut your mouth and/or fingers, posing a laceration hazard.
injuries: The firm has received four reports of incidents, resulting in four laceration injuries to the hand and mouth.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was caught in swinging doors, tripped, fell to the floor, and suffered a hip injury. The employee was hospitalized, requiring hip surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee finished his shift at 2:00 AM, and went back into the deli to wash his hands. He slipped on a wet floor and fell, breaking his ankle.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee tripped on a crack in the concrete parking lot. He fell, suffering a head injury that included loss of consciousness as well as injuries to both knees.
An employee was struck by an opening car door and fell to the ground, resulting in a hip injury. The employee was hospitalized and required surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was making drinks in a beverage area and her foot became caught under the mini fridge located under a counter, causing her to fall to the ground. The employee suffered a broken hip.
